scripts.docker:build:local: set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a && docker build -t artium-web:local --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL" --build-arg NEXTAUTH_URL="$NEXTAUTH_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY="$NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_ETH_WALLET="$NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_ETH_WALLET" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_ID="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_ID" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_NAME="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_NAME" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_RPC_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_RPC_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_BLOCK_EXPLORER_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_BLOCK_EXPLORER_URL" .
scripts.docker:build:prod: set -a && . ./.env.prod && set +a && docker build -t artium-web:prod --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL" --build-arg NEXTAUTH_URL="$NEXTAUTH_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY="$NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_ETH_WALLET="$NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_ETH_WALLET" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_ID="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_ID" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_NAME="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_CHAIN_NAME" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_RPC_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_RPC_URL" --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_BLOCK_EXPLORER_URL="$NEXT_PUBLIC_ETH_BLOCK_EXPLORER_URL" .
scripts.docker:local: npm run docker:build:local && npm run docker:run:local
scripts.docker:prod: npm run docker:build:prod && npm run docker:run:prod
